title: Learn flexbox the easy way
description: Kevin Powell explains flex-basis and how it sets the initial main axis size of flex items before growing or shrinking

title: Learn Flexbox in 15 Minutes
description: Kyle covers flex-basis and how it differs from width, with examples of auto vs fixed basis values

title: Flexbox Crash Course
description: Brad Traversy explains flex-basis and how it works alongside flex-grow and flex-shrink in the flex layout algorithm

title: Deeper dive into the math of flex-grow and flex-shrink
description: Kevin Powell covers how flex-basis interacts with grow and shrink ratios in the flex sizing calculation
